chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C. P. No. D–6516 of 2022 (Muhammad Nasir Vs. Government of Pakistan & another) DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). For hearing of main case: 14.10.2024 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, D.A.G..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Petitioner was called absent on 07.08.2023, 08.08.2024 and so also today there is no intimation either. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Asif
